raw_transcript: Keep them very small and well-chewed, or avoid them during flares. I want to confirm the diagnosis with a Gastric Emptying Study. You'll eat a standardized meal—usually eggs with a small amount of radioactive tracer—and we'll take pictures over four hours to see how much is left in your stomach.
final_corrected_note: Keep them very small and well-chewed, or avoid them during flares. I want to confirm the diagnosis with a Gastric Emptying Study. You'll eat a standardized meal—usually eggs with a small amount of radioactive tracer—and we'll take pictures over four hours to see how much is left in your stomach.
